text.title: C4 Model for Architecture Visualization Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid spec artefact for c4-model. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner plural; toolchain not in enum; levels missing required keys; sync_policy absent.

forbidden.pattern: `levels` contains fewer than 3 entries (L1, L2, L3 required).
`sync_policy` empty — diagrams without sync policy stale within 1 quarter.
